text.body:
In this lesson, you’ll explore the Rate Card and learn to read it for your job. This document is important for account strategists and campaign specialists. You'll need it to make your media plan recommendations. It’s also handy for any optimization or upselling you’ll do in the post-launch phase. Since each sales channel works with different ad products, budgets and clients, the PYM team creates a rate card for each sales channel.

We’ll also explore some important resources on our Wiki that will help you plan.

Note:Note: The Rate Card featured here is not the most updated version, so make sure you download the latest version from Salesforce! If you’re in the national sales channel, make sure to check out the CPE section of your rate card.
